title: Flooring Repairs
overview: Complete a workplace task relating to flooring repairs and record evidence.
knowledgeQuestion: Explain the principles, materials and regulations relevant to this task.
skillQuestion: Describe how you planned, completed and checked the repair.
behaviourQuestion: Describe how you demonstrated safe working, responsibility and professionalism.
combinedStatementPrompt: Produce a 100-word workplace statement including planning, tools, materials, PPE, quality checks, waste handling and problem solving.
